- tracking_period_start: next Monday at 09:00 (which would be 2026-03-30 09:00)
- tracking_period_end: next Friday at 18:00 (which would be 2026-04-03 18:00)
- created_at: current time
- objectives: array with title and key_results for each

The file should be saved to day10/ directory with proper naming convention (20260327_<description>.json).The user wants me to create an OKR tracking file for next week in JSON format with specific fields.
